understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to win all levels of the KA59 puzzle by positioning every selectable piece (P or S) onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously, achieving a WIN condition for the level and progressing through level.current to level.total.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece (identified by player.position and shown as P) in the specified direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) but blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at the exact target_position pixel coordinates, though invalid targets result in no change; positions are pixel-based (3 pixels per cell), and actions consume from a finite steps_remaining budget per level.
